title: fagara scandens
intro: Fagara scandens, also known as the Chinese prickly ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Fagara scandens include relieving pain, reducing fever, and aiding in digestion, as well as being used to treat various respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. Fagara scandens is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
